questions.scenario: Incident sonrasinda encrypted overlay network olustur: `secure-net`.

steps.answer: docker network create -d overlay --opt encrypted secure-net

questions.scenario: Bakim oncesi swarm unlock key bilgisini goster.

steps.hint_text: Unlock key icin `docker swarm unlock-key` kullan.

questions.scenario: Troubleshooting sirasinda swarm task history limit'ini 5 yap.

steps.hint_text: Task history limiti icin `docker swarm update` kullan.

questions.scenario: Deploy sonrasi `worker-179` service loglarini raw formatta goster.
Kesinti incelemesinde `db-180-180` service icin spread placement preference ekle: `node.labels.zone`.
Yeni acilan hostta `worker1` node bilgisini okunur formatta goster.

steps.hint_text: Node icin okunur output `--pretty` ile gelir.

questions.scenario: Runbook adiminda `queue-182` service icin rolling update'i paralellik 2 ve gecikme 10s ile ayarla.

steps.hint_text: Rolling update davranisi icin update flag'lerini kullan.

questions.scenario: Operasyon kontrolunde `bastion-183` service rollback davranisini paralellik 2 ve gecikme 5s yap.

steps.hint_text: Rollback parametreleri icin ilgili flag'leri kullan.

questions.scenario: Incident sonrasinda `worker1` node'a `zone=eu1` label'i ekle.
Bakim oncesi `web-185` service'i sadece `zone=eu1` label'li node'larda kosacak sekilde guncelle.
